allow: Bash(python agent.py run --topic "AI in creative automation" --mock-ai)
Bash(python agent.py run --topic "AI in creative automation" --mock-ai --dry-run)
Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('data/novamind.db'\); print\(*[r[0] for r in c.execute\('SELECT id, topic FROM campaigns ORDER BY id'\).fetchall\(\)], sep='\\n'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect\('data/novamind.db'\); print\('campaigns:', conn.execute\('SELECT id,topic,status FROM campaigns'\).fetchall\(\)\); print\('metrics count:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM performance_metrics'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)")
